title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Metro Cash & Carry in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Metro Cash & Carry:
Metro Cash & Carry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
